 over naive full-document retrieval.

6.text:
AI Resume Screening Tool for Recruiters (AI-Powered Resume Analyser)
Python   FastAPI   OpenAI API   spaCy   React.js
  Solved the recruiter problem of manually matching resumes to job descriptions   built an LLM-powered scoring system that surfaces
 skill gaps and match quality instantly.
  Designed a two-stage pipeline (spaCy NER for skill extraction   OpenAI API for semantic gap analysis) achieving 87% accuracy on
 skill-match classification across a 200-resume labelled dataset.
  Built a custom evaluation benchmark of 200 resume JD pairs with human-labelled skill gaps enabling reproducible measurement of
 model improvements across iterations.
